mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, name, phone, role, CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END as active, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, username, email, name, phone, role, CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END as active, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, username, email, name, phone, role, CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END as active, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, username, email, name, phone, role, CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END as active, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{request.email}, name = #{request.name}, phone = #{request.phoneNumber}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET status = CASE WHEN #{active} = true THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'INACTIVE' END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, username, password, email, name, role, CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END as active FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
